title: Routes Changes Collection
description: Authoritative HTTP contract (methods, paths, query, bodies, status codes) for **Routes Changes Collection** under `/v1`. Handlers and OpenAPI MUST match this spec exactly so CLI, agents, and Studio stay aligned. HTTP for listing and creating changes.
context: Authoritative HTTP contract (methods, paths, query, bodies, status codes) for **Routes Changes Collection** under `/v1`. Handlers and OpenAPI MUST match this spec exactly so CLI, agents, and Studio stay aligned. HTTP for listing and creating changes.

rules.requirement: collection routes list changes drafts discarded and archived
rules: The API MUST expose `GET /changes`, `/drafts`, `/discarded`, `/archived-changes`, and `/changes/overlaps` mapping to the corresponding kernel list and overlap operations.

rules.requirement: drafts and discarded are read-only collections
rules: `GET /drafts` and `GET /discarded` MUST return read-only summaries backed by drafted/discarded views. These collections exist for navigation and inspection only; lifecycle mutation entry points for drafts live under `/drafts/{name}/*` and MUST NOT be mixed into `/changes/{name}/*`.

rules.requirement: POST changes creates a new change
rules: `POST /changes` MUST accept a `CreateChange` input body and return the created change summary.

rules.requirement: POST changes separates request validation from schema preconditions
rules:
`POST /changes` MUST validate the request body shape through Fastify route schema before handler logic runs. Invalid input MUST return HTTP 400 with `application/problem+json` and code `INVALID_REQUEST`.

After request validation succeeds, the handler MUST load the active schema and reject change creation when the schema resolves only to a raw reference rather than a compiled schema object. This rejection is a business precondition failure, not a request-shape validation error.

rules.requirement: list responses include summary fields for sidebars
rules: List endpoints MUST return `name`, description snippet, derived lifecycle state, `updatedAt` when known, and blocker count sufficient for Studio sidebars.

rules.requirement: archived-changes list returns paginated archive index rows
rules:
`GET /v1/archived-changes` MUST mirror the merged `ListArchived` contract by returning an object with:

- `items`: archive index rows
- `meta`: pagination metadata

Each archive index row MUST include at least `name`, `archivedName`, `archivedAt`, `specIds`, `schemaName`, `schemaVersion`, `workspaces`, and `artifacts`. Studio maps those rows to archived sidebar summaries without fetching full archived detail first.

constraints: @specd/api delivery and composition code MUST import host bootstrap and kernel types from @specd/sdk, not @specd/core or @specd/code-graph directly.
HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.requirement: collection routes list changes drafts discarded and archived
scenarios.name: GET /changes returns sidebar summaries
then: each row includes name, state, and updatedAt
AND blocker count is present when known

scenarios.requirement: drafts and discarded are read-only collections
scenarios.name: GET /drafts returns sidebar summaries (read-only)
then: each row includes name, state, and updatedAt
AND response is navigation-only (no per-row action fields)

scenarios.requirement: drafts and discarded are read-only collections
scenarios.name: GET /discarded returns sidebar summaries (read-only)
then: each row includes name, state, and updatedAt

scenarios.requirement: drafts and discarded are read-only collections
scenarios.name: GET archived-changes returns archive index payload
then: HTTP status is 2xx
AND body contains items and meta
AND each item includes name and archivedName

scenarios.requirement: drafts and discarded are read-only collections
scenarios.name: Undocumented path returns 404
when: client requests a URL outside this routes contract
then: HTTP 404 is returned
AND body is application/problem+json

scenarios.requirement: POST changes creates a new change
scenarios.name: POST /changes validates input
then: HTTP 400 problem+json
AND no change directory created

scenarios.requirement: POST changes creates a new change
scenarios.name: POST /changes returns expected payload
then: HTTP status is 2xx
AND JSON body matches the documented DTO or envelope

scenarios.requirement: POST changes separates request validation from schema preconditions
scenarios.name: Invalid request shape fails before schema lookup
then: HTTP 400 application/problem+json is returned
AND the handler does not create a change

scenarios.requirement: POST changes separates request validation from schema preconditions
scenarios.name: Raw active schema blocks creation as business precondition
given: the active schema resolves only to a raw reference
when: client sends an otherwise valid POST /v1/changes
then: change creation is rejected after request validation
AND the failure is reported as a schema precondition, not as an input-shape validation error

scenarios.requirement: POST changes separates request validation from schema preconditions
scenarios.name: Undocumented path returns 404
when: client requests a URL outside this routes contract
then: HTTP 404 is returned
AND body is application/problem+json

scenarios.requirement: list responses include summary fields for sidebars
scenarios.name: Each change row includes name and state
then: items have name and lifecycle state
AND UI can render sidebar without detail fetch

scenarios.requirement: list responses include summary fields for sidebars
scenarios.name: updatedAt is present for polling
then: updatedAt ISO string on each row
AND hooks can compare for refresh

scenarios.requirement: list responses include summary fields for sidebars
scenarios.name: Blocker count included when known
then: summary includes blocker count or flag
AND full findings are not inlined

scenarios.requirement: archived-changes list returns paginated archive index rows
scenarios.name: GET archived-changes returns both identifiers and pagination metadata
then: each items element includes name and archivedName
AND the response includes meta.total, meta.count, and meta.limit
AND Studio can render archive rows without an additional lookup

scenarios.requirement: archived-changes list returns paginated archive index rows
scenarios.name: Empty archive returns an empty list
then: HTTP 200 is returned with items: []
AND no synthetic placeholder rows are added
